title: Depth Recurrence 5x3 d672 SwiGLU
body:
## Summary

5 unique transformer blocks reused 3x for 15 effective layers at width 672 with SwiGLU MLP, replacing the baseline 9-layer d=512 relu-squared architecture. Same ~16.5M parameter budget, significantly more effective depth and width via parameter sharing. Eval at seqlen 2048 for longer context. Warmdown, momentum warmup, and gradient clipping tuned for the shorter step budget (~4700 steps on 8xH100 vs baseline's ~13800). int8+zlib artifact well under the 16MB cap.
